name: Hagar Sent Away
notes: Hagar driven into the wilderness twice. The shared beats are linked: the mistress driving her out, Hagar in the wilderness at water, the angel of God, and the promise that Ishmael becomes a nation. The two wells are deliberately left unlinked: Beer-lahai-roi (Gen 16) and the well near Beer-sheba (Gen 21) are different named places, and the sequence differs (angel finds her at the fountain in Gen 16; the well appears after the angel speaks in Gen 21).
